definitions: A condiment specifically designed to accompany noodles, often used for dipping individual strands or bites of noodles.
A flavorful liquid, typically savory, in which noodles are dipped before consumption to enhance their taste.
examples: She prepared a homemade noodle dipping sauce.
The restaurant offered several noodle dipping sauce options.
He preferred a spicy noodle dipping sauce.
